scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:vite" "npm run dev:electron:watch" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:vite && npm run build:main && npm run build:electron
scripts.version:bump-preview: node -e "const pkg = require('./package.json'); const match = pkg.version.match(/0\.(\d+)\.(\d+)-preview-(\d+)/); if (match) { const [_, major, minor, y] = match; pkg.version = '0.' + major + '.' + minor + '-preview-' + (parseInt(y) + 1); require('fs').writeFileSync('./package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2)); console.log('版本已更新为:', pkg.version); } else { console.error('版本号格式不符合规则，请检查package.json中的version字段'); }"
scripts.pack:mac:zip: rm -rf release-artifacts/mac-zip && npm run build:vite && npm run build:main && env -u ELECTRON_MIRROR ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://github.com/electron-userland/electron-builder-binaries/releases/download/ electron-builder --mac zip --config.directories.output=release-artifacts/mac-zip
scripts.pack:mac:dmg: rm -rf release-artifacts/mac-dmg && npm run build:vite && npm run build:main && env -u ELECTRON_MIRROR ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://github.com/electron-userland/electron-builder-binaries/releases/download/ electron-builder --mac dmg --config.directories.output=release-artifacts/mac-dmg
scripts.pack:mac:dmg:arm64: rm -rf release-artifacts/mac-arm64 && npm run build:vite && npm run build:main && env -u ELECTRON_MIRROR ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://github.com/electron-userland/electron-builder-binaries/releases/download/ electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --config.directories.output=release-artifacts/mac-arm64
scripts.pack:mac:dmg:x64: rm -rf release-artifacts/mac-x64 && npm run build:vite && npm run build:main && env -u ELECTRON_MIRROR ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://github.com/electron-userland/electron-builder-binaries/releases/download/ electron-builder --mac dmg --x64 --config.directories.output=release-artifacts/mac-x64
scripts.pack:mac:dmg:universal: rm -rf release-artifacts/mac-universal && npm run build:vite && npm run build:main && env -u ELECTRON_MIRROR ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://github.com/electron-userland/electron-builder-binaries/releases/download/ electron-builder --mac dmg --universal --config.directories.output=release-artifacts/mac-universal
scripts.pack:win:nsis: rm -rf release-artifacts/win && npm run build:vite && npm run build:main && env -u ELECTRON_MIRROR ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://github.com/electron-userland/electron-builder-binaries/releases/download/ electron-builder --win nsis --config.directories.output=release-artifacts/win
scripts.pack:win:zip: rm -rf release-artifacts/win-zip && npm run build:vite && npm run build:main && env -u ELECTRON_MIRROR ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://github.com/electron-userland/electron-builder-binaries/releases/download/ electron-builder --win zip --config.directories.output=release-artifacts/win-zip
